operation: First, a workplane is initialized on the XY plane, with the starting sketch point set at coordinate (10, 0). A 22-unit long vertical line is drawn upward, followed by a straight line segment to point (25, 42). A three-point arc is then drawn, with the middle control point at (0, 53) and end point at (-25, 42). Next, a straight line segment is drawn to point (-10, 22), followed by a 22-unit long vertical line drawn downward. The 2D sketch is closed to form a symmetric closed profile, which is then extruded 2.0 units along the Z-axis to form the final solid part.
geometry: This is a flat solid part with uniform thickness, featuring a fully symmetric profile across its vertical center plane. Its cross-section has a straight horizontal lower edge, two straight slanted side edges rising to upper corner points, and a smooth convex curved upper edge. All faces are planar except for the single curved vertical side face formed by extruding the upper arc of the original 2D profile.
function: This thin symmetric curved plate component is intended for use as a shim, gasket, small mounting bracket, or trim insert, with its curved top edge shaped to fit against matching curved mating surfaces for spacing, sealing, or light structural support.
